Table of contents

  • 1 Load packages
  • 2 Load data
  • 3 Phylosymbiosis
  • 4 Global bact phylosignal
    • 4.1 Bulk_T0
    • 4.2 Rhizosphere
    • 4.3 Rhizoplane
    • 4.4 Endosphere
    • 4.5 Nodules
  • 5 Genotype bact phylosignal
  • 6 Link modulation / lambda
  • 7 Host phylogenetic signal
  • 8 NRI
    • 8.1 Link HPF NRI

Phylogenetic_analyses

Author

Victor ANGOT

Note

To be able to run this code, please download “SD4_MMC_ROOTED.tre” and “SD5_pisum_phylogeny” from the zenodo link: “https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19066852”, and use them as “MCC_ROOTED_300M_G0.tre” and “phylo_pois.tre” in the code. You must also previously run the analysis presented in: “Data_preparation.html” and “Ecological_analyses_html”

1 Load packages

Code 
library(geiger)
library(phytools)
library(vegan)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(picante)

2 Load data

Code 
tree_bact <- read.tree(file = "data/MCC_ROOTED_300M_G0.tre")
tree_bact <- chronos(tree_bact)

Setting initial dates...
Fitting in progress... get a first set of estimates
         (Penalised) log-lik = -1176.213 
Optimising rates... dates... -1176.213 

log-Lik = -1176.213 
PHIIC = 14590.43
Code 
tree_host <- read.tree("data/phylo_pois.tre")
tree_host <- chronos(tree_host)

Setting initial dates...
Fitting in progress... get a first set of estimates
         (Penalised) log-lik = -0.8798803 
Optimising rates... dates... -0.8798803 

log-Lik = -0.8783661 
PHIIC = 137.76
Code 
edgeR_comp <- read.csv(file = "results/results_all_edgeR.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")
edgeR_genotype <- read.csv(file = "results/edgeR_by_genotype.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",")

mydf=read.csv(file="data/mydf_hard_cleaned_0_005.csv",sep=";")
design=read.csv(file="data/design_propre.csv",sep=";")

3 Phylosymbiosis

Code 
dist_bact <- vegdist(t(mydf), method = "bray")
dist_pea <- cophenetic(tree_host)

compartments <- c("R", "Rp", "E", "N")

get_host_dist_expanded <- function(host_vec, dist_pea) {
  m <- dist_pea[host_vec, host_vec]
  as.dist(m)
}

get_bact_dist_subset <- function(samples, dist_bact) {
  idx <- match(samples, attr(dist_bact, "Labels"))
  as.dist(as.matrix(dist_bact)[idx, idx])
}

make_bubble_data <- function(dist_host, dist_bact, bins = 20) {

  df <- data.frame(
    x = as.vector(dist_host),
    y = as.vector(dist_bact)
  )

  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(
      xb = cut(x, bins),
      yb = cut(y, bins)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      count = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      x = (as.numeric(sub("\\((.+),.*", "\\1", xb)) +
           as.numeric(sub("[^,]*,([^]]*)\\]", "\\1", xb))) / 2,
      y = (as.numeric(sub("\\((.+),.*", "\\1", yb)) +
           as.numeric(sub("[^,]*,([^]]*)\\]", "\\1", yb))) / 2
    )
}


make_bubble_plot <- function(agg, raw, comp, mantel_res) {

  ggplot(agg, aes(x, y)) +
    geom_point(aes(size = count, fill = count),
               shape = 21, color = "white", stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +

    geom_smooth(
      data = raw,
      aes(x, y),
      method = "lm",
      se = TRUE,
      color = "black",
      fill = "grey70",
      alpha = 0.3,
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +

    scale_size(range = c(1, 20)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Number of comparisons") +

    labs(
      x = "Host phylogenetic distance",
      y = "Bray-Curtis distance",
      title = paste("Phylosymbiosis —", comp),
      subtitle = paste0(
        "Mantel r = ", round(mantel_res$statistic, 3),
        " ; p = ", format(mantel_res$signif, scientific = TRUE, digits = 2)
      )
    ) +

    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )
}


results <- lapply(compartments, function(comp_name) {

  cat("\nCompartiment :", comp_name)

  design_comp <- dplyr::filter(design, comp == comp_name)

  dist_bact_sub <- get_bact_dist_subset(design_comp$sample, dist_bact)
  dist_host_sub <- get_host_dist_expanded(design_comp$nom_genotype, dist_pea)

  mantel_res <- mantel(dist_host_sub, dist_bact_sub,
                       method = "pearson",
                       permutations = 9999)

  raw_df <- data.frame(
    x = as.vector(dist_host_sub),
    y = as.vector(dist_bact_sub)
  )

  agg_df <- make_bubble_data(dist_host_sub, dist_bact_sub)

  p <- make_bubble_plot(agg_df, raw_df, comp_name, mantel_res)

  print(p)

  ggsave(
    paste0("plot/phylosymbiosis_bubble_", comp_name, ".svg"),
    p, width = 10, height = 7, bg = "white"
  )

  saveRDS(p, paste0("plot/phylosymbiose_", comp_name, ".RDS"))

  data.frame(
    compartiment = comp_name,
    correlation = mantel_res$statistic,
    p_value = mantel_res$signif
  )
})

Compartiment : R

Compartiment : Rp

Compartiment : E

Compartiment : N
Code 
results_df <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = p_value < 0.05
  )

print(results_df)
  compartiment correlation p_value significant
1            R  0.17426586  0.0001        TRUE
2           Rp  0.30440766  0.0001        TRUE
3            E  0.07404153  0.0059        TRUE
4            N -0.02076357  0.6660       FALSE

4 Global bact phylosignal

4.1 Bulk_T0

Code 
#Bulk_T0
results_Bulk_T0=edgeR_comp[edgeR_comp$comparison=="Bulk_vs Bulk_T0",]

data_plot <- setNames(results_Bulk_T0$logFC, results_Bulk_T0$ASV)
chk = name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)
chk

[909] "Haloarcula_mukohataei"      "Haloarcula_vallismortis"   
[911] "Thermococcus_gammatolerans"

$data_not_tree
character(0)
Code 
tree_not_data=chk$tree_not_data

tree_Bulk_T0=ape::drop.tip(tree_bact, tree_not_data)


chk = name.check(tree_Bulk_T0, data_plot)
chk
[1] "OK"
Code 
length(tree_Bulk_T0$tip.label)
[1] 1130
Code 
pagel_fit=phylosig(tree_Bulk_T0, data_plot, method="lambda", test=TRUE, niter = 10)
pval=round(pagel_fit$P,3)
lambda=round(pagel_fit$lambda,2)

obj = contMap(tree_Bulk_T0, data_plot, plot=FALSE)

library(phytools)

my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "yellow", "green"))

# Applique cette palette à l'objet contMap
obj$cols[] <- my_palette(length(obj$cols))

# Export TIFF
tiff_filename <- "plot/Bulk_Bulk_T0_edgeR.tiff"
tiff(tiff_filename, width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)

plot(obj, type = "fan", legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_Bulk_T0)),
     sig = 2, fsize = c(0.0000001, 0.9), outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE, offset = 1000, lwd = 1)

titre <- paste0("Bulk_Bulk_T0_edgeR (lambda = ", lambda, "   p-value ", pval, ")")
title(main = titre)

4.2 Rhizosphere

Code 
#R
results_R=edgeR_comp[edgeR_comp$comparison=="Bulk_vs R",]

data_plot <- setNames(results_R$logFC, results_R$ASV)
chk = name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)
chk

chk = name.check(tree_R, data_plot)

[1] "OK"
Code 
length(tree_R$tip.label)
[1] 1963
Code 
pagel_fit=phylosig(tree_R, data_plot, method="lambda", test=TRUE, niter = 10)
pval=round(pagel_fit$P,3)
lambda=round(pagel_fit$lambda,2)

obj = contMap(tree_R, data_plot, plot=FALSE)

library(phytools)

my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "yellow", "green"))

# Applique cette palette à l'objet contMap
obj$cols[] <- my_palette(length(obj$cols))

# Export TIFF
tiff_filename <- "plot/Bulk_R_edgeR.tiff"
tiff(tiff_filename, width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)

plot(obj, type = "fan", legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_R)),
     sig = 2, fsize = c(0.0000001, 0.9), outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE, offset = 1000, lwd = 1)

titre <- paste0("Bulk_R_edgeR (lambda = ", lambda, "   p-value ", pval, ")")
title(main = titre)

pagel_fit=phylosig(tree_Rp, data_plot, method="lambda", test=TRUE, niter = 10)
pval=round(pagel_fit$P,3)
lambda=round(pagel_fit$lambda,2)

obj = contMap(tree_Rp, data_plot, plot=FALSE)

# Applique cette palette à l'objet contMap
obj$cols[] <- my_palette(length(obj$cols))

# Export TIFF

     sig = 2, fsize = c(0.0000001, 0.9), outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE, offset = 1000, lwd = 1)

[1] "ASV2466" "ASV2481" "ASV2643" "ASV2698" "ASV2935" "ASV3107" "ASV3148"
Code

chk = name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)

[687] "Haloarcula_mukohataei"      "Haloarcula_vallismortis"   
[689] "Thermococcus_gammatolerans"

$data_not_tree
character(0)
Code 
tree_not_data=chk$tree_not_data

tree_E=ape::drop.tip(tree_bact, tree_not_data)


chk = name.check(tree_E, data_plot)
chk
[1] "OK"
Code 
length(tree_E$tip.label)
[1] 1352
Code 
pagel_fit=phylosig(tree_E, data_plot, method="lambda", test=TRUE, niter = 10)
pval=round(pagel_fit$P,3)
lambda=round(pagel_fit$lambda,2)

obj = contMap(tree_E, data_plot, plot=FALSE)

library(phytools)

my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "yellow", "green"))

# Applique cette palette à l'objet contMap
obj$cols[] <- my_palette(length(obj$cols))

# Export TIFF
tiff_filename <- "plot/Bulk_E_edgeR.tiff"
tiff(tiff_filename, width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)

plot(obj, type = "fan", legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_E)),
     sig = 2, fsize = c(0.0000001, 0.9), outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE, offset = 1000, lwd = 1)

titre <- paste0("Bulk_E_edgeR (lambda = ", lambda, "   p-value ", pval, ")")
title(main = titre)

4.5 Nodules

Code 
#N
results_N=edgeR_comp[edgeR_comp$comparison=="Bulk_vs N",]

data_plot <- setNames(results_N$logFC, results_N$ASV)
chk = name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)
chk
$tree_not_data

[1] "ASV2481" "ASV2643" "ASV3107" "ASV3148"
Code 
data_not_tree=chk$data_not_tree

data_plot=data_plot[!names(data_plot) %in% data_not_tree]
chk = name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)
chk

$data_not_tree
character(0)
Code 
tree_not_data=chk$tree_not_data

tree_N=ape::drop.tip(tree_bact, tree_not_data)


chk = name.check(tree_N, data_plot)
chk
[1] "OK"
Code 
length(tree_N$tip.label)
[1] 886
Code 
pagel_fit=phylosig(tree_N, data_plot, method="lambda", test=TRUE, niter = 10)
pval=round(pagel_fit$P,3)
lambda=round(pagel_fit$lambda,2)

obj = contMap(tree_N, data_plot, plot=FALSE)

library(phytools)

my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "yellow", "green"))

# Applique cette palette à l'objet contMap
obj$cols[] <- my_palette(length(obj$cols))

# Export TIFF
tiff_filename <- "plot/Bulk_N_edgeR.tiff"
tiff(tiff_filename, width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)

plot(obj, type = "fan", legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_N)),
     sig = 2, fsize = c(0.0000001, 0.9), outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE, offset = 1000, lwd = 1)

titre <- paste0("Bulk_N_edgeR (lambda = ", lambda, "   p-value ", pval, ")")
title(main = titre)

5 Genotype bact phylosignal

Code 
compartments <- unique(edgeR_genotype$comparison)
compartments <- grep("^Bulk_vs ", compartments, value = TRUE)



all_lambda_results <- data.frame()


for (comp in compartments) {
  cat("\n=== Processing", comp, "===\n")
  
  comp_data <- edgeR_genotype %>% filter(comparison == comp)
  genotypes <- unique(comp_data$genotype)
  
  for (geno in genotypes) {
    cat("  Genotype:", geno, "\n")
    
    geno_data <- comp_data %>% filter(genotype == geno)
    
    if (nrow(geno_data) < 10) {
      cat(" Not enough ASVs (", nrow(geno_data), "), skip\n")
      next
    }

    data_plot <- setNames(geno_data$logFC, geno_data$ASV)
    

    chk <- name.check(tree_bact, data_plot)

    if (!is.null(chk$data_not_tree)) {
      data_plot <- data_plot[!names(data_plot) %in% chk$data_not_tree]
    }
    
    tree_temp <- tree_bact
    
    chk <- name.check(tree_temp, data_plot)
    if (!is.null(chk$tree_not_data)) {
      tree_temp <- ape::drop.tip(tree_temp, chk$tree_not_data)
    }
    
    chk <- name.check(tree_temp, data_plot)
    if (chk != "OK") {
      cat("    Problem, skip\n")
      next
    }
    
    if (length(data_plot) < 10) {
      cat("    Not enough ASVs (", length(data_plot), "), skip\n")
      next
    }
    
    tryCatch({

      lambda_fit <- fitContinuous(tree_temp, data_plot, model = "lambda")
      lambda_value <- lambda_fit$opt$lambda
      lambda_value <- round(lambda_value, 3)

      all_lambda_results <- rbind(all_lambda_results, data.frame(
        genotype = geno,
        compartment = comp,
        lambda = lambda_value,
        n_ASV = length(data_plot),
        mean_logFC = mean(data_plot, na.rm = TRUE),
        median_logFC = median(data_plot, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_sig = sum(geno_data$FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
      
      cat("    Lambda:", lambda_value, "\n")
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("    Error:", e$message, "\n")
    })
  }
}

print(all_lambda_results)

6 Link modulation / lambda

Code 
modulation=read.csv(file="results/specialization_indices_clean.csv",sep=",")

lambda=read.csv(file="results/all_lambda_compartiments_genotypes.csv",sep=",")
colnames(modulation) <- gsub("^specialization_", "", colnames(modulation))

lambda$comp <- gsub("^Bulk_vs\\s*", "", lambda$compartment)
unique(lambda$comp)
[1] "E"  "N"  "R"  "Rp"
Code 
str(modulation)
'data.frame':   24 obs. of  6 variables:
 $ genotype           : chr  "KAYANNE" "CAPSICUM" "CAMEOR" "CHAMPAGNE" ...
 $ R                  : num  0.632 0.691 0.637 0.732 0.675 ...
 $ Rp                 : num  0.763 0.777 0.69 0.842 0.757 ...
 $ E                  : num  0.921 0.934 0.927 0.935 0.919 ...
 $ N                  : num  0.963 0.96 0.973 0.97 0.966 ...
 $ mean_specialization: num  0.82 0.841 0.807 0.87 0.829 ...
Code 
str(lambda)
'data.frame':   96 obs. of  8 variables:
 $ genotype    : chr  "KAYANNE" "CAPSICUM" "CAMEOR" "CHAMPAGNE" ...
 $ compartment : chr  "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" ...
 $ lambda      : num  0.911 0.856 0.865 0.896 0.863 0.904 0.842 0.836 0.834 0.891 ...
 $ n_ASV       : int  729 760 727 609 692 743 712 745 723 819 ...
 $ mean_logFC  : num  -3.12 -2.81 -3.14 -5.08 -3.69 ...
 $ median_logFC: num  -6.67 -6.42 -6.67 -7.05 -6.67 ...
 $ n_sig       : int  648 652 635 562 617 684 603 621 601 728 ...
 $ comp        : chr  "E" "E" "E" "E" ...
Code 
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

modulation_long <- modulation %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(R, Rp, E, N),
    names_to = "comp",
    values_to = "modulation"
  )

lambda_sub <- lambda %>%
  select(genotype, comp, lambda)

corr_data <- modulation_long %>%
  inner_join(lambda_sub, by = c("genotype", "comp"))

table(corr_data$comp)

 E  N  R Rp 
24 24 24 24
Code 
data_split <- split(corr_data, corr_data$comp)
normality_tests <- lapply(data_split, function(df) {
  data.frame(
    modulation_p = shapiro.test(df$modulation)$p.value,
    lambda_p       = shapiro.test(df$lambda)$p.value
  )
})

normality_tests <- bind_rows(normality_tests, .id = "comp")
normality_tests
  comp modulation_p   lambda_p
1    E   0.16862594 0.46146342
2    N   0.27842721 0.09450451
3    R   0.12787281 0.82840438
4   Rp   0.04669493 0.04790052
Code 
cor_results <- corr_data %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    rho = cor(modulation, lambda, method = "pearson"),
    p_value = cor.test(modulation, lambda, method = "pearson")$p.value
  )

print(cor_results)
# A tibble: 4 × 4
  comp      n      rho  p_value
  <chr> <int>    <dbl>    <dbl>
1 E        24 -0.00308 9.89e- 1
2 N        24  0.184   3.90e- 1
3 R        24  0.820   9.48e- 7
4 Rp       24  0.935   2.26e-11
Code 
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(corr_data, aes(x = lambda, y = modulation)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ comp, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda",
    y = "modulation index",
    title = "Correlation between mudolation and lambda"
  )
Code 
design_unique <- design %>%
  select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>%
  distinct()

corr_data <- corr_data %>%
  left_join(design_unique,
            by = c("genotype" = "nom_genotype"))

p_corr=corr_data %>%
  filter(comp == "Rp") %>%   # Rhizoplan
  ggplot(aes(x = lambda, y = modulation, color = sub_species)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda",
    y = "Modulation index",
    color = "Sub-species",
    title = "Relationship between modulation index and lambda in the rhizoplan"
  )

ggsave("plot/correlation_modulation_lambda_rhizoplan_by_subspecies.svg", plot=p_corr,
       width = 10, height = 7)
saveRDS(p_corr,
     file = "plot/correlation_modulation_lambda_rhizoplan_by_subspecies.rds")

p_corr

7 Host phylogenetic signal

Code 
all_lambda_results <- read.csv(
  "results/all_lambda_compartiments_genotypes.csv",
  header = TRUE
)

for (comp in compartments) {
  comp_lambda <- all_lambda_results %>%
    filter(compartment == comp)

  if (nrow(comp_lambda) == 0) {
    message("SKIP", comp)
    next
  }
  
  lambda_vec <- setNames(comp_lambda$lambda, comp_lambda$genotype)

  lambda_vec <- lambda_vec[names(lambda_vec) %in% tree_host$tip.label]

  if (length(lambda_vec) < 2) {
    message("SKIP ", comp)
    next
  }

  fit <- fitContinuous(tree_host, lambda_vec, model = "lambda")
  lambda_value <- fit$opt$lambda
  lambda_value <- round(lambda_value, 3)
  obj <- contMap(tree_host, lambda_vec, plot = FALSE)

  pal <- colorRampPalette(c("red", "yellow", "green"))
  obj$cols[] <- pal(length(obj$cols))

  comp_name_clean <- comp |>
    gsub("Bulk_vs_", "", x = _) |>
    gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]", "_", x = _)

  tiff_filename <- paste0(
    "plot/lambda_", comp_name_clean, "_host_tree.tiff"
  )
  
 tiff(tiff_filename, width = 3200, height = 2000, res = 300)

par(mar = c(5,4,4,12))

plot(obj,
     type = "phylogram",
     legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_host)),
     sig = 2,
     fsize = c(0, 1.2),
     ftype = "i",
     offset = 1,
     x.lim = c(0, max(nodeHeights(tree_host)) * 2),
     outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE,
     lwd = 5)

title(main = paste0("Lambda on host tree - ", comp, " (lambda = ", lambda_value, ")"))

dev.off()

svg_filename <- sub("\\.tiff$", ".svg", tiff_filename)

svg(svg_filename, width = 12, height = 8)  # dimensions en pouces

par(mar = c(5,4,4,12))

plot(obj,
     type = "phylogram",
     legend = 0.4 * max(nodeHeights(tree_host)),
     sig = 2,
     fsize = c(0, 1.2),
     ftype = "i",
     offset = 1,
     x.lim = c(0, max(nodeHeights(tree_host)) * 2),
     outline = FALSE,
     underscore = FALSE,
     lwd = 5)

title(main = paste0("Lambda on host tree - ", comp, " (lambda = ", lambda_value, ")"))

dev.off()


}


plot_df <- all_lambda_results %>%
  filter(compartment %in% compartments)

lev_compartment=c("Bulk_vs R", "Bulk_vs Rp", "Bulk_vs E", "Bulk_vs N")

stats_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(compartment) %>%
  summarise(
    min_lambda = min(lambda, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_lambda = max(lambda, na.rm = TRUE),
    range_lambda = max_lambda - min_lambda
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0(
      "min=", round(min_lambda, 2),
      "\nmax=", round(max_lambda, 2),
      "\nΔ=", round(range_lambda, 2)
    ),
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf
  )


plot_df$compartment <- factor(plot_df$compartment, levels = lev_compartment)
plot_df$genotype = factor(plot_df$genotype, levels = rev(tree_host$tip.label))


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = genotype, y = lambda)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ compartment, scales = "free_y") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  geom_text(
    data = stats_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.1,
    size = 3
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Genotype",
    y = "Lambda",
    title = "Lambda values by genotype across compartments"
  )
Code 
ggsave("plot/lambda_genotype_comp.svg", width = 12, height = 8)

design_unique <- design %>%
  select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>%
  distinct()

plot_df2 <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(design_unique,
            by = c("genotype" = "nom_genotype"))

plot_df2$genotype = factor(plot_df2$genotype, levels = rev(tree_host$tip.label))

plot_rp <- plot_df2 %>%
  filter(compartment == "Bulk_vs Rp")

gb <- ggplot_build(p_corr)
cols_used <- unique(gb$data[[1]]$colour)
groups <- gb$data[[1]]$group
levels_sub <- levels(factor(corr_data$sub_species[corr_data$comp=="Rp"]))

pal_exact <- setNames(cols_used, levels_sub)

p_rp <- ggplot(plot_rp,
               aes(x = genotype, y = lambda, fill = sub_species)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_exact) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Genotype",
    y = "Lambda",
    fill = "Sub-species",
    title = "Lambda by genotype — Rhizoplan"
  )

ggsave("plot/lambda_genotype_rhizoplan.svg",
       p_rp,
       width = 10,
       height = 6)
saveRDS(p_rp,
     file = "plot/lambda_genotype_rhizoplan.RDS")



lambda_long <- all_lambda_results %>%
  filter(compartment %in% compartments) %>%
  mutate(
    compartiment = gsub("Bulk_vs ", "", compartment),
    compartiment = factor(compartiment, levels = c("R","Rp","E","N"))
  ) %>%
  select(genotype, compartiment, lambda)

lambda_long <- lambda_long %>%
  left_join(
    design %>%
      select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = c("genotype" = "nom_genotype")
  )

p_lambda_profiles <- ggplot(
  lambda_long,
  aes(x = compartiment, y = lambda, group = genotype)
) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(aes(color = sub_species), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Phylogenetic signal (lambda) across microhabitats by genotypes",
    x = "Microhabitat",
    y = "Lambda"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

ggsave("plot/lambda_profiles.svg",
       p_lambda_profiles,
       width = 10,
       height = 6)

saveRDS(p_lambda_profiles,
        file = "plot/lambda_profiles.RDS")

p_lambda_profiles

8 NRI

Code 
is.ultrametric(tree_bact)
[1] TRUE
Code 
tmydf <- log10(t(mydf) + 1)  
tree_bact <- tree_bact 

common_taxa <- intersect(colnames(tmydf), tree_bact$tip.label)
tmydf <- tmydf[, common_taxa]
tree_bact <- keep.tip(tree_bact, common_taxa)

set.seed(123) 
nri_results <- ses.mpd(
  tmydf, 
  cophenetic(tree_bact),
  null.model = "taxa.labels",
  abundance.weighted = TRUE,
  runs = 100          
)

results_nri <- data.frame(
  id = rownames(nri_results),
  mpd_obs = nri_results$mpd.obs,
  mpd_obs_z = nri_results$mpd.obs.z,  
  nri = -nri_results$mpd.obs.z,        
  mpd_rand_mean = nri_results$mpd.rand.mean,
  mpd_rand_sd = nri_results$mpd.rand.sd,
  runs = nri_results$runs,
  p_value = nri_results$mpd.obs.p
)

if (!"id" %in% colnames(design)) {
  design$id <- rownames(design)
}

nri_data <- left_join(design, results_nri, by = "id")
rownames(nri_data) <- nri_data$id

nri_data$comp <- factor(nri_data$comp, 
                         levels = c("Bulk_T0", "Bulk", "R", "Rp", "E", "N"))


nri_plot_comp <- ggplot(nri_data, aes(x = comp, y = nri, fill = comp)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.96, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -1.96, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkorange3", "orange", "green", "blue", "purple", "red")) +
  labs(x = "Microhabitats", 
       y = "NRI (Net Relatedness Index)") +
  ggtitle("Phylogenetic clustering (NRI) by microhabitats") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(
  filename = "plot/nri_plot_comp.png",     
  plot = nri_plot_comp, 
  width = 6, height = 6,          
  dpi = 600                          
)

ggsave(nri_plot_comp, file = "plot/nri_plot_comp.svg")


nri_median_comp <- nri_data %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(
    median_nri = median(nri, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(nri, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(nri, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_nri = mean(nri, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_nri = sd(nri, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_signif_clustering = sum(nri > 1.96, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_signif_overdisp = sum(nri < -1.96, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_total = n()
  )

print(nri_median_comp)
# A tibble: 6 × 9
  comp    median_nri     Q1     Q3 mean_nri sd_nri n_signif_clustering
  <fct>        <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl>    <dbl>  <dbl>               <int>
1 Bulk_T0    -0.0679 -0.293  0.122   -0.106  0.636                   0
2 Bulk       -0.631  -1.36  -0.211   -0.653  0.772                   0
3 R           1.28   -0.245  3.58     1.68   2.74                   77
4 Rp          4.37    2.59   6.42     4.34   2.60                  167
5 E          10.2     8.87  11.6     10.2    2.25                  204
6 N          25.7    20.6   30.0     25.0    6.35                  198
# ℹ 2 more variables: n_signif_overdisp <int>, n_total <int>

8.1 Link HPF NRI

Code 
lambda <- read.csv(file = "results/all_lambda_compartiments_genotypes.csv", sep = ",")
lambda$comp <- gsub("^Bulk_vs\\s*", "", lambda$compartment)
unique(lambda$comp)
[1] "E"  "N"  "R"  "Rp"
Code 
str(lambda)
'data.frame':   96 obs. of  8 variables:
 $ genotype    : chr  "KAYANNE" "CAPSICUM" "CAMEOR" "CHAMPAGNE" ...
 $ compartment : chr  "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" ...
 $ lambda      : num  0.911 0.856 0.865 0.896 0.863 0.904 0.842 0.836 0.834 0.891 ...
 $ n_ASV       : int  729 760 727 609 692 743 712 745 723 819 ...
 $ mean_logFC  : num  -3.12 -2.81 -3.14 -5.08 -3.69 ...
 $ median_logFC: num  -6.67 -6.42 -6.67 -7.05 -6.67 ...
 $ n_sig       : int  648 652 635 562 617 684 603 621 601 728 ...
 $ comp        : chr  "E" "E" "E" "E" ...
Code 
nri_genotype <- nri_data %>%
  filter(comp %in% c("R", "Rp", "E", "N")) %>%
  group_by(nom_genotype, comp) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_nri = mean(nri, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_nri = sd(nri, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

correlation_data_nri <- nri_genotype %>%
  inner_join(lambda, by = c("nom_genotype" = "genotype", "comp" = "comp"))


if(!"nom_genotype" %in% colnames(design)) {
  design$nom_genotype <- rownames(design) 
}


subspecies_info <- design %>%
  dplyr::select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>%
  distinct()


correlation_data_nri <- correlation_data_nri %>%
  left_join(subspecies_info, by = "nom_genotype")


table(correlation_data_nri$sub_species, useNA = "ifany")

          Pisum fulvum Pisum sat. abyssinicum     Pisum sat. elatius 
                    12                     12                     48 
    Pisum sat. sativum 
                    24
Code 
cor_results_nri <- correlation_data_nri %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    rho = cor(mean_nri, lambda, method = "pearson"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_nri, lambda, method = "pearson")$p.value,
    rho_spearman = cor(mean_nri, lambda, method = "spearman"),
    p_spearman = cor.test(mean_nri, lambda, method = "spearman")$p.value
  )

print(cor_results_nri)
# A tibble: 4 × 6
  comp      n    rho    p_value rho_spearman p_spearman
  <chr> <int>  <dbl>      <dbl>        <dbl>      <dbl>
1 E        24 0.0549 0.799           0.141   0.510     
2 N        24 0.0681 0.752          -0.00913 0.966     
3 R        24 0.814  0.00000134      0.792   0.00000394
4 Rp       24 0.819  0.00000100      0.554   0.00501
Code 
p_corr_nri <- correlation_data_nri %>%
  filter(comp == "Rp") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lambda, y = mean_nri, color = sub_species)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda (HPF intensity)",
    y = "Mean NRI",
    color = "Sub-species",
    title = "Relationship between NRI and HPF (lambda) in the rhizoplan"
  )

print(p_corr_nri)
Code 
ggsave("plot/correlation_NRI_lambda_rhizoplan_by_subspecies.svg", 
       plot = p_corr_nri,
       width = 10, 
       height = 7)

saveRDS(p_corr_nri,
        file = "plot/correlation_NRI_lambda_rhizoplan_by_subspecies.rds")

p_corr_nri_all <- correlation_data_nri %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lambda, y = mean_nri, color = sub_species)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(group = comp), color = "black", 
              linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~comp, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Lambda (HPF intensity)",
    y = "Mean NRI",
    color = "Sub-species",
    title = "NRI vs HPF across compartments"
  )

ggsave("plot/correlation_NRI_lambda_all_compartments.svg", 
       plot = p_corr_nri_all,
       width = 12, 
       height = 10)

stats_detail <- correlation_data_nri %>%
  group_by(comp, sub_species) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    rho = cor(mean_nri, lambda, method = "pearson"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_nri, lambda, method = "pearson")$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(stats_detail)
# A tibble: 16 × 5
   comp  sub_species                n     rho p_value
   <chr> <chr>                  <int>   <dbl>   <dbl>
 1 E     Pisum fulvum               3 -0.962  0.176  
 2 E     Pisum sat. abyssinicum     3  0.0107 0.993  
 3 E     Pisum sat. elatius        12  0.174  0.588  
 4 E     Pisum sat. sativum         6  0.0990 0.852

 6 N     Pisum sat. abyssinicum     3  0.993  0.0730 
 7 N     Pisum sat. elatius        12 -0.399  0.198  
 8 N     Pisum sat. sativum         6  0.611  0.197  
 9 R     Pisum fulvum               3 -0.366  0.761  
10 R     Pisum sat. abyssinicum     3  0.915  0.264  
11 R     Pisum sat. elatius        12  0.804  0.00162
12 R     Pisum sat. sativum         6  0.892  0.0170 
13 Rp    Pisum fulvum               3 -0.922  0.252  
14 Rp    Pisum sat. abyssinicum     3  0.265  0.829  
15 Rp    Pisum sat. elatius        12  0.427  0.167  
16 Rp    Pisum sat. sativum         6  0.974  0.00104
Code 
write.csv(correlation_data_nri, 
          "results/correlation_data_NRI_lambda.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(cor_results_nri, 
          "results/correlation_results_NRI_lambda.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

p_corr_nri_all
